body.expr:class: "font-body bg-bg text-fg has-mobile-tabbar" + (data:view.isHomepage ? " sb-view-home" : (data:view.isPost ? " sb-view-post" : (data:view.isPage ? " sb-view-page" : "")))

div.class: font-racing text-[10px] tracking-[0.28em] uppercase text-fg-soft mt-1

header.class: fixed top-0 inset-x-0 z-40 hidden md:block pt-4

div.class: v-capsule rounded-full px-3 py-2 flex items-center gap-3

a.class: flex items-center gap-2.5 pl-2 pr-3 group

div.class: relative w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-orange-500 flex items-center justify-center text-white font-display font-extrabold text-sm shadow-[0_8px_20px_-8px_rgba(255,106,26,0.6)] group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform

a.class: font-racing text-sm uppercase tracking-wide px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-fg hover:text-primary transition-colors sb-glow-underline
font-racing text-sm uppercase tracking-wide px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-fg hover:text-primary transition-colors sb-glow-underline
font-racing text-sm uppercase tracking-wide px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-fg hover:text-primary transition-colors sb-glow-underline
font-racing text-sm uppercase tracking-wide px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-fg hover:text-primary transition-colors sb-glow-underline
font-racing text-sm uppercase tracking-wide px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-fg hover:text-primary transition-colors sb-glow-underline

button.class: w-9 h-9 rounded-full border border-line/60 hover:border-primary/50 text-fg hover:text-primary transition-colors flex items-center justify-center
w-9 h-9 rounded-full border border-line/60 hover:border-primary/50 text-fg hover:text-primary transition-colors flex items-center justify-center

a.class: v-pill-cta text-sm py-2.5 px-5

header.class: fixed top-0 inset-x-0 z-40 md:hidden pt-3 px-3

div.class: v-capsule rounded-full pl-2 pr-3 py-2 flex items-center gap-3

a.class: flex items-center gap-2

div.class: relative w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-orange-500 flex items-center justify-center text-white font-display font-extrabold text-sm

button.class: w-9 h-9 rounded-full border border-line/60 flex items-center justify-center text-fg
w-9 h-9 rounded-full border border-line/60 flex items-center justify-center text-fg

div.class: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-orange-500 flex items-center justify-center text-white font-display font-extrabold text-sm

button.class: w-9 h-9 rounded-full border border-line text-fg flex items-center justify-center

a.class: flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 p-4 rounded-xl border border-line bg-bg-2/40 text-fg hover:border-primary/50 hover:text-primary transition-colors
flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 p-4 rounded-xl border border-line bg-bg-2/40 text-fg hover:border-primary/50 hover:text-primary transition-colors
flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 p-4 rounded-xl border border-line bg-bg-2/40 text-fg hover:border-primary/50 hover:text-primary transition-colors
flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 p-4 rounded-xl border border-line bg-bg-2/40 text-fg hover:border-primary/50 hover:text-primary transition-colors
flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 p-4 rounded-xl border border-line bg-bg-2/40 text-fg hover:border-primary/50 hover:text-primary transition-colors
flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 p-4 rounded-xl border border-line bg-bg-2/40 text-fg hover:border-primary/50 hover:text-primary transition-colors

div.class: mt-4 flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-xl border border-line bg-bg-2/40

button.class: font-racing text-xs tracking-widest uppercase px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full bg-primary/15 text-primary border border-primary/30

a.class: mt-4 v-pill-cta w-full justify-center text-sm py-3

button.class: w-8 h-8 rounded-full border border-line text-fg-muted hover:text-primary flex items-center justify-center

div.class: max-w-2xl mx-auto mt-6 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-2

a.class: v-pill-ghost text-xs py-1.5 px-3
v-pill-ghost text-xs py-1.5 px-3
v-pill-ghost text-xs py-1.5 px-3
v-pill-ghost text-xs py-1.5 px-3

h1.class: font-display font-extrabold tracking-tight text-fg text-3xl md:text-4xl leading-[1.05]

aside.p: Premium quality, hand-picked by the Shokher Bikewala team. WhatsApp us to confirm specs & pricing.

article.class: v-capsule rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-10 max-w-5xl mx-auto

h1.class: font-display font-extrabold tracking-tight text-fg text-3xl md:text-5xl mt-3

div.class: sb-page-body prose prose-sm md:prose max-w-none mx-auto text-fg-muted

span.class: font-racing text-[11px] tracking-[0.32em] uppercase text-primary sb-flicker

h1.class: sb-cinematic-title text-4xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl mx-auto max-w-5xl

div.p: Premium helmets, jackets, gloves & accessories — hand-picked for riders who want gear as fast as their bike.

div.class: v-reveal v-reveal-up mt-8 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-3
v-reveal v-reveal-up mt-10 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-2 md:gap-3 max-w-3xl mx-auto

a.class: scroll-cue hidden md:flex

div.p: Choose your gear category and find what fits your ride.

a.class: v-cat-card group p-5 flex flex-col items-center text-center

div.class: w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/20 to-orange-500/10 flex items-center justify-center text-primary mb-3 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform
font-racing text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-fg-soft mt-1

span.class: mt-3 inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-primary font-racing text-xs uppercase tracking-widest opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100

a.class: v-cat-card group p-5 flex flex-col items-center text-center

font-racing text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-fg-soft mt-1

span.class: mt-3 inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-primary font-racing text-xs uppercase tracking-widest opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100

a.class: v-cat-card group p-5 flex flex-col items-center text-center

div.class: w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/20 to-orange-500/10 flex items-center justify-center text-primary mb-3 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform
font-racing text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-fg-soft mt-1

span.class: mt-3 inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-primary font-racing text-xs uppercase tracking-widest opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100

div.p: Hand-picked premium gear our riders love most.
Six reasons why Bangladesh riders trust us for their gear.

div.class: v-reveal v-reveal-up premium-card p-5 md:p-6 text-center
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-primary/15 text-primary mx-auto mb-3 flex items-center justify-center

div.p: Order today, get it within 1-3 days countrywide.

div.class: v-reveal v-reveal-up premium-card p-5 md:p-6 text-center
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-primary/15 text-primary mx-auto mb-3 flex items-center justify-center
v-reveal v-reveal-up premium-card p-5 md:p-6 text-center
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-primary/15 text-primary mx-auto mb-3 flex items-center justify-center

div.p: On orders above BDT 5,000 across Bangladesh.

div.class: v-reveal v-reveal-up premium-card p-5 md:p-6 text-center
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-primary/15 text-primary mx-auto mb-3 flex items-center justify-center

div.p: Talk to real riders before you buy.

div.class: v-reveal v-reveal-up premium-card p-5 md:p-6 text-center
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-primary/15 text-primary mx-auto mb-3 flex items-center justify-center
v-reveal v-reveal-up premium-card p-5 md:p-6 text-center
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-primary/15 text-primary mx-auto mb-3 flex items-center justify-center

div.p: Follow us, share your ride, get featured.

a.class: sb-social-card v-reveal v-reveal-up

div.class: flex items-center justify-between mb-3 relative z-10
w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-pink-500 to-purple-600 text-white flex items-center justify-center
mt-3 font-racing text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-fg-muted

a.class: sb-social-card v-reveal v-reveal-up

div.class: flex items-center justify-between mb-3 relative z-10
w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-[#1877F2] text-white flex items-center justify-center
flex items-center gap-2 mb-3 relative z-10

a.p: Best ride gear shop in Bangladesh. Authentic stock, fair price.

div.class: mt-3 font-racing text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-fg-muted relative z-10

a.class: sb-social-card v-reveal v-reveal-up

div.class: flex items-center justify-between mb-3 relative z-10
w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-black text-white flex items-center justify-center
aspect-[9/16] rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-black via-zinc-800 to-black flex items-center justify-center text-white relative z-10 overflow-hidden
absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/20 via-transparent to-cyan/20
mt-3 grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 text-center relative z-10

a.class: sb-social-card v-reveal v-reveal-up

div.class: flex items-center justify-between mb-3 relative z-10
w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-[#25D366] to-[#128C7E] text-white flex items-center justify-center

a.p: Talk to a real human. We answer within minutes during business hours (Sat-Thu 10am - 9pm).

div.class: mt-3 font-display font-extrabold text-fg text-lg tracking-tight relative z-10

div.p: Fast delivery, premium quality helmet. Exactly as shown in the picture. Highly recommended!

div.class: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/40 to-orange-500/30 flex items-center justify-center font-display font-extrabold text-primary

div.p: Authentic gear, fair pricing. The team helped me pick the right jacket size over WhatsApp. Great service.

div.class: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-cyan/40 to-blue-500/30 flex items-center justify-center font-display font-extrabold text-cyan

div.p: Best motorbike accessories shop. Got my full kit (helmet, jacket, gloves, boots) for a great combined deal.

div.class: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-yellow-500/40 to-orange-500/30 flex items-center justify-center font-display font-extrabold text-gold

div.div: Inside Dhaka: same-day or next-day. Outside Dhaka: 2-3 working days via courier. Free delivery on orders above BDT 5,000.

button.span: Do you provide Cash on Delivery (COD)?

div.div: Yes. COD available across Bangladesh. You can also pay via bKash/Nagad/Rocket or bank transfer for advance payment.
100%. We source all gear directly from authorized distributors. Every product comes with manufacturer warranty where applicable.
7-day return on unused products in original packaging. Contact us within 7 days of delivery via WhatsApp.

button.span: How do I choose the right size?

div.div: WhatsApp us your measurements (head, chest, height) and we will suggest the right size. We have a sizing guide for each product page.

footer.class: relative mt-12 pt-16 pb-10 border-t border-line/40

a.class: flex items-center gap-2 mb-3

div.class: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-orange-500 flex items-center justify-center text-white font-display font-extrabold text-sm

div.p: Bangladesh's most trusted source for premium motorbike accessories & gear. Hand-picked by riders, for riders.

a.class: w-9 h-9 rounded-full border border-line/60 hover:border-primary/50 hover:text-primary flex items-center justify-center text-fg-muted transition-colors

div.div: © document.write(new Date().getFullYear()) Shokher Bikewala. All rights reserved.

a.class: v-fab v-fab-whatsapp
